race.comment: PRECISE TORQUE (9) peaks and has been threatening a win. Races forward and has race fitness and a handy 2kg claim. Gets his chance in a depleted field. AWARDED DIFFERENCE (1) debuts and showed enough in his Deagon trial to suggest this is winnable. Metro trained and everything points to a bold run. QUIT 'N' TAP (3) debuts and won that trial. Not sure the inside gate will advantage but he's goning to be right in it on what we've seen. TROFEO (7) is in the sharp Vandyke yard and he is likely to make good improvement second-up. Had trialled well and the gelding has been kept on the fresh side. Keep safe.
